summary: A first‑time Dead fan’s unforgettable night captured on a solid soundboard recording.
review: The reviewer describes the concert as "great" and says it sparked a lifelong love of the band. The soundboard is noted to sound good, making the show enjoyable even beyond the memorable pre‑show parking‑lot incident.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed 5‑star review; strong enthusiasm for both performance and soundboard quality yields a high rating, but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer simply says the soundboard sounds good; no specific issues or praises about clarity or mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure; reviewer focuses on overall enjoyment of the concert.
